focus.label: Focus
focus.desc: A photo is required to stop the reminder

onboarding.description: An accurate location means accurate times. Choose how to set yours.

locationEditor.searchLabel: or search for an address / area
locationEditor.cityLabel: or pick a city from the list

messages.geoUnavailable: Geolocation isn't available on this device.
messages.locationDenied: Location access denied. Try the address search below.
messages.notFound: Place not found. Try a more specific address or city.
messages.searchFailed: Search isn't available right now. Try again or pick a city from the list.

toast.modeFocus: Focus mode: a photo is required to stop the reminder.
toast.reminderPostponed: Reminder snoozed — {{count}} snooze(s) left this week.
toast.prayerConfirmed: Prayer confirmed — may it be accepted.

calendar.title: Monthly calendar
calendar.note: Times computed with your current method. If a mosque is active, its times only apply to today.

ai.notConfigured: AI service not configured: add your Gemini key to the .env.local file (see README), then restart the app.

mosques.title: Nearby mosques
mosques.description: Online search around {{place}}. You can use a mosque's times instead of the astronomical calculation.
mosques.none: No mosque found online near this place. Try again, or check your location.
mosques.failed: Search isn't available right now. Try again in a moment.
mosques.quota: The AI service is currently rate-limited by Google Gemini. Please try again later or use an already cached result.
mosques.disclaimer: Times generated via AI web search — they may be approximate or outdated. Check with the mosque for the iqama.

qibla.title: Qibla
qibla.liveHint: The arrow points to the Kaaba — turn with your phone.
qibla.staticHint: Direction of the Kaaba from {{place}} (relative to north).
qibla.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Enable the compass in your browser settings.

stats.title: Consistency
stats.footer: Consistency matters more than a perfect score. A missed day takes nothing away from the ones that follow.

settings.title: Settings
settings.mosqueNote: Note: “{{name}}”'s times currently override this calculation.
settings.notifDesc: Reminder 10 min before each prayer and at adhan time (while the app is open).
settings.notifDenied: Notifications blocked by the browser. Allow them in its settings.
settings.notifUnsupported: Notifications aren't supported in this browser.
settings.manualAdjustDesc: Enter a HH:MM offset if you want to move a prayer earlier or later.
settings.privacy: Privacy: photos are only used for verification and are never saved, on the device or on a server.

alarm.title: It's time for {{prayer}}
alarm.instructions: To stop the reminder: a photo of the tap for ablution, or of your prayer mat.

camera.frameHint: Frame the tap or the prayer mat
camera.unavailable: Camera unavailable here (permission denied or restricted browser).
camera.verifyUnavailable: Verification isn't available right now. Try again.
